# viettelidc_ovpc_network_interface_attachment (Resource)

Attaches a ViettelIDC NIC to a VM instance. Composite ID: nic_id/instance_id.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `instance_id` (String)
- `network_interface_id` (String)

### Optional

- `vpc_id` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Composite ID: <network_interface_id>/<instance_id>.
